// Selected Work

Projects

Game Character Design

Frontline Force

Modern reboot of the classic Half-Life mod — three soldier classes (Assault, Recon, Support) with near-future military aesthetic. Capes, advanced helmets, distinct silhouettes.

2.5D Environment

Steampunk Electricity Plant

A 2.5D steampunk robot factory and electricity plant spanning comic-book frames, pixel art renditions, and soft-depth atmospheric shots.

Board Game Art

Post-Apocalyptic Game Designs

Survivor-camp facility graphics for a post-apocalyptic board game — gardens, workshops, and apocalypse vehicles from rusty shells to fully weaponised Mad Max rigs.

Urban Art

Minneapolis Skyline

Artistic renditions of the Minneapolis skyline — nostalgic pixel art, dramatic night cityscapes, and aerial overviews created for commercial web use.

Sci-fi Card Game

M.A.V. — Strategy Card Game

Psychic-organic alien vehicles and ecosystems — assault vehicles, massive battleships, and self-sustaining star nexus habitats with glowing Psi-Trees.
